instruction: Help me organize the product data into the insight document

command: DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.screensaver idle-activation-enabled false 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.session idle-delay 0 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset s off 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset -dpms 2>/dev/null; true

python3 -c "
import openpyxl
wb = openpyxl.Workbook()
ws = wb.active
ws['A1'] = 'Product Line'
ws['B1'] = 'MAU(10K)'
ws['C1'] = 'Conversion Rate(%)'
ws['D1'] = 'NPS Score'
ws['A2'] = 'Flagship'
ws['B2'] = 28.5
ws['C2'] = 8.2
ws['D2'] = 72
ws['A3'] = 'Standard'
ws['B3'] = 65.3
ws['C3'] = 5.6
ws['D3'] = 65
ws['A4'] = 'Lite'
ws['B4'] = 42.1
ws['C4'] = 3.2
ws['D4'] = 58
ws['A5'] = 'Enterprise'
ws['B5'] = 12.8
ws['C5'] = 15.6
ws['D5'] = 78
wb.save('/home/user/Desktop/product_metrics.xlsx')
"

phases.instruction: Help me organize the product data into the insight document

Find the product line with the highest NPS from /home/user/Desktop/product_metrics.xlsx, append to /home/user/Desktop/product_insight.txt: 'Highest NPS Product Line: Enterprise (NPS=78, Conversion 15.6%)', save

include: Highest NPS Product Line: Enterprise (NPS=78, Conversion 15.6%)
